entry.title: 🌸 Sane C++ May 26
entry.summary: Welcome to the May 2026 update! This month introduces the new Await coroutine library, expands Http into something much more practical, and keeps pushing SC-package and standard C++ integration forward.

entry.title: 🌷 Sane C++ April 26
entry.summary: Welcome to the April 2026 update! This month makes SC::Build much more practical as the default native workflow, a real cross-compilation tool, and an easier entry point for external projects.

entry.title: ☔️ Sane C++ March 26
entry.summary: Welcome to the March 2026 update! This month focuses on a much more capable native backend in SC::Build, plus faster Http parsing and the first standalone HttpClient library.

entry.title: 🔌 Sane C++ February 26
entry.summary: Welcome to the February 2026 update! This month introduces SerialPort, named-pipe end-to-end support, and major async backend wakeup/process handling improvements.

entry.title: ❄️ Sane C++ January 26
entry.summary: Welcome to the January 2026 update! It looks like AI is taking over the world (starting from writing code better and faster than humans). Probably this entire project is now totally useless and obsolete, but let's do one more monthly update (maybe the last?) !

entry.title: 🌫️ Sane C++ December 25
entry.summary: Welcome to the December 2025 update! This month the Http library is finally losing its dependency on Memory and gets a lot of reliability fixes!

entry.title: 2️⃣ Years of Sane C++ Libraries
entry.summary: A look back at the second year of the Sane C++ Libraries project, highlighting a massive dependency cleanup, the "No Allocations" guarantee, single-file libraries, and much more.

entry.title: 🌫️ Sane C++ November 25
entry.summary: Welcome to the November 2025 update! This month, focus is bringing the long neglected Http library out of its initial Draft state!

entry.title: 🌧️ Sane C++ October 25
entry.summary: Welcome to the October 2025 update! This month internal dependencies have been further removed.

entry.title: 🍂 Sane C++ September 25
entry.summary: Welcome to the September 2025 update! The main focus this month has been on breaking internal dependencies to enhance modularity.

entry.title: 🌊 Sane C++ August 25
entry.summary: Welcome to the update post for August 2025! This month we finally have Single File Libs!!!

entry.title: 🏖️ Sane C++ July 25
entry.summary: Welcome to the update post for July 2025! It's dependency cleanup month! 🧹🧹🧹

entry.title: ☀️ Sane C++ June 25
entry.summary: Welcome to the update post for June 2025! This month brings a new async file system operations, an enhanced UDP socket support in SC::Async and some dependency cleanup with the Memory library split from Foundation!

entry.title: 🌸 Sane C++ May 25
entry.summary: Welcome to the update post for May 2025! This month a new object called AsyncSequence has been added to SC::Async together with a good list of smaller improvements!

entry.title: 💤 Sane C++ April 25
entry.summary: Welcome to the update post for April 2025! This month has been mostly spent adding Process fork, Async vectorized writes and Memory Dump to Containers!

entry.title: ☔️ Sane C++ March 25
entry.summary: Welcome to the update post for March 2025! This month has been mostly spent adding custom allocators support to all Containers!

entry.title: 🎠 Sane C++ February 25
entry.summary: Welcome to the update post for February 2025! This month has been mostly spent re-writing Containers and SC::Build libraries!

entry.title: ❄️ Sane C++ January 25
entry.summary: Welcome to the update post for January 2025! This month has been mostly spent improving SC::Async library!

entry.title: ☃️ Sane C++ December 24
entry.summary: Welcome to the update post for December 2024! This month has been mostly spent improving SC::AsyncStreams library with Async Transform Streams!

entry.title: 1️⃣ Year of Sane C++
entry.summary: Time flies, it's been already one year since the first public release of Sane C++ Libraries!

entry.title: 🌫️ Sane C++ November 24
entry.summary: Welcome to the update post for November 2024! Main focus of the month is the addition of Async Streams!

entry.title: 🌊 Sane C++ August 24
entry.summary: Welcome to the update post for August 2024! August has been spent doing some first round of improvements to the SC::Http library.

entry.title: 🏖️ Sane C++ July 24
entry.summary: Welcome to the update post for July 2024! The focus of the month has been building a nicer showcase for SC::Plugin and SC::Serialization libraries.

entry.title: ☀️ Sane C++ June 24
entry.summary: Welcome to the Sane C++ Libraries June 2024 update post! The month has been spent mainly building SCExample, a small GUI example app to showcase some Libraries (mainly SC::Async / SC::Plugin / SC::FileSystemWatcher).

entry.title: 🌸 Sane C++ May 24
entry.summary: Welcome to the Sane C++ Libraries May 2024 update post! No big feature has been added this month, so this is a month a bugfixes and incremental improvements.

entry.title: 💤 Sane C++ April 24
entry.summary: Here we are with the forth monthly update for Sane C++ Libraries!

entry.title: ☔️ Sane C++ March 24
entry.summary: Welcome to the third monthly update for Sane C++ Libraries!

entry.title: 🎠 Sane C++ February 24
entry.summary: Two months have passed since the initial release of Sane C++ Libraries! 🎉🎉🎉 This post collects all relevant events happened during the second month of (public) life of the project.

entry.title: ❄️ Sane C++ January 24
entry.summary: One month has passed since the initial release of Sane C++ Libraries 🎉🎉🎉 This post collects all relevant events happened during the first month of (public) life of the project.

entry.title: 🎉 Sane C++ Libraries
entry.summary: Let's go!
